summary: Frontend testing completed for Register plus static/code-route verification of Team, Services, Settings, and Barber Dashboard migrations. Register flow passed responsive and inline-validation checks; critical route mapping and legacy browser-dialog usage issues remain.

ui_bugs.issue: Unmatched Route appears on /admin/barbers and /barber while related grouped paths (/(admin)/barbers, etc.) resolve.

integration_issues.issue: No test credentials/session provided; could not execute end-to-end runtime interactions (invite copy, commission save/remove, service toggle persistence, settings save/upload, quick-booking conflict prevention) against authenticated state.

action_items: Fix public/deep-link route mapping consistency for admin/barber pages (avoid Unmatched Route on /admin/barbers and /barber).
Remove legacy window.alert/window.confirm/window.prompt usage from migrated route files to satisfy the no-browser-dialog requirement for new experiences.
Provide authenticated test credentials/seed data to validate Team, Services, Settings and Barber Dashboard runtime integrations end-to-end.
critical_code_review_comments: Legacy screen implementations remain in the same route files as migrated experiences and still contain window.alert/window.confirm/window.prompt. Even if not currently exported, this is high regression risk and violates requested UX standard.
Route strategy mixes grouped paths (/(admin)/...) with plain paths (/admin/...), causing inconsistent URL behavior and observable Unmatched Route failures.
Auth testing guideline file /app/auth_testing.md is missing in this workspace path; keep docs path aligned to avoid auth test drift for next agents.
test_credentials: Read /app/memory/test_credentials.md. File states no test accounts available; authenticated flows remain pending.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated Register screen on desktop/mobile with data-testid selectors, role conditional fields, and inline error handling; no horizontal overflow at 390px and 1920px on tested Register screen. Route checks found /admin/barbers and /barber unmatched while grouped routes resolve. TypeScript passed (yarn tsc --noEmit) and expo-doctor passed via npx expo-doctor (20/20).
rca of the issue: Reproduction: visit /admin/barbers or /barber on web; page shows 'Unmatched Route'. Root cause hypothesis: expo-router route groups are being linked inconsistently between public aliases and grouped paths. In parallel, legacy functions in /(admin)/barbers.tsx and /(barber)/index.tsx still use browser dialogs (window.confirm/prompt/alert), indicating partial migration and leftover dead/legacy code paths. Mitigation: normalize route linking strategy and remove legacy dialog-based handlers from migrated route files.
